CreateResolverRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateResolverRule.name: Forwarding rule name. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters `-_/ .`. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Length: 1–65
CreateResolverRule.resolverId: Must be an outbound resolver. Uses this outbound endpoint to forward DNS query traffic to the IP addresses specified in the target IP list
CreateResolverRule.dnsServerConfigs: List of IP addresses and ports of the external DNS system
CreateResolverRule.dnsServerConfigs.port: Port number of the target IP address for forwarding
